title: Mito, Ibaraki — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mito, Ibaraki: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mito is a city in Ibaraki with a population of 270,000. The capital of Ibaraki Prefecture known for its historic Kairakuen Garden, cultural heritage, and relaxed lifestyle.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
